title: Upload a valid SMA dataset and reach the dashboard overview
description: This verifies that a valid .xlsx dataset can be uploaded, processed, and made available for fleet analysis on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /Upload
Upload a valid SMA .xlsx file
Wait for processing to complete
Verify a successful processing confirmation is visible
Verify the dashboard KPI overview is displayed

title: View the dashboard landing page after data is available
description: This verifies that the dashboard shows the fleet KPI overview as the main landing experience once processed data is available.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the dashboard KPI overview is displayed
Verify fleet summary metrics are displayed

title: Recover from an invalid upload by correcting the file
description: This verifies that invalid or incomplete data is rejected with validation feedback and that a corrected upload can be processed successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /Upload
Upload an invalid or incomplete .xlsx file
Verify a validation error is visible
Upload a valid SMA .xlsx file
Wait for processing to complete
Verify a successful processing confirmation is visible
Verify the dashboard KPI overview is displayed

title: Review fleet performance metrics on the ranking page
description: This verifies that the ranking page shows fleet-level performance summaries, a ranking chart, and the detailed inverter table.

steps.description: Navigate to /Ranking
Verify fleet performance metric cards are displayed
Verify the performance ranking chart is displayed
Verify the detailed ranking table is displayed

title: Inspect anomaly records after filtering by fault type
description: This verifies that the anomaly report can be filtered to a specific fault type and that matching records are shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /Anomalies
Verify the anomaly scatter plot is displayed
Filter the report to a specific fault type
Verify matching anomaly records are displayed

title: Compare inverter positions within the ranking chart
description: This verifies that users can inspect the ranking chart to compare inverter positions across the fleet.

steps.description: Navigate to /Ranking
Interact with the performance ranking chart
Verify inverter ranking positions are displayed
Verify the fleet comparison view remains visible

title: Review anomaly instances across the report
description: This verifies that users can inspect anomaly instances from the scatter plot and see the corresponding records in the report.

steps.description: Navigate to /Anomalies
Select a fault pattern of interest
Verify the anomaly scatter plot is displayed
Verify anomaly record details are displayed

title: Analyze MPPT behavior for a selected inverter
description: This verifies that an inverter can be selected and its current and voltage heatmaps and underperformance alerts are shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /MPPT_Analysis
Select an inverter
Toggle the current heatmap
Toggle the voltage heatmap
Verify the MPPT heatmaps are displayed
Verify underperformance alerts are displayed

title: Select an inverter and review MPPT heatmaps
description: This verifies that a user can choose an inverter and see both MPPT heatmaps for channel-level inspection.

steps.description: Navigate to /MPPT_Analysis
Select an inverter from the dropdown
Verify MPPT heatmaps are displayed
Verify channel-level behavior for the selected inverter is displayed

title: Move from fleet review into inverter-level diagnostics
description: This verifies that a user can move from higher-level fleet analysis into MPPT diagnostics to investigate suspected issues.

steps.description: Navigate to /Ranking
Verify the ranking page is displayed
Navigate to /MPPT_Analysis
Verify the MPPT analysis page is displayed
Navigate to /Anomalies
Verify the anomaly report page is displayed

title: Switch between current and voltage MPPT views
description: This verifies that a user can toggle the MPPT view and compare current and voltage behavior for the selected inverter.

steps.description: Navigate to /MPPT_Analysis
Select an inverter from the dropdown
Toggle to the current heatmap view
Toggle to the voltage heatmap view
Verify both current and voltage heatmap views are available for comparison

title: Review underperformance alerts for an inverter
description: This verifies that a user can inspect MPPT alerts after choosing an inverter and identify any underperforming channels.

steps.description: Navigate to /MPPT_Analysis
Select an inverter from the dropdown
Verify underperformance alerts are displayed
Verify the alerts identify problematic channels or behavior

title: Change inverter selection and update diagnostics
description: This verifies that changing the selected inverter updates the displayed MPPT diagnostics to match the new inverter.

steps.description: Navigate to /MPPT_Analysis
Select one inverter from the dropdown
Select a different inverter from the dropdown
Verify the MPPT diagnostics update for the newly selected inverter
Verify the heatmaps reflect the newly selected inverter

title: Inspect MPPT behavior after moving from another analysis page
description: This verifies that a user can move from fleet-level analysis into MPPT diagnostics and continue investigating a suspected inverter issue.

steps.description: Navigate to /Ranking
Click the link to open MPPT analysis
Select an inverter from the dropdown
Verify MPPT diagnostics are displayed for the selected inverter
Verify underperformance alerts or heatmaps support inverter-level investigation

title: View MPPT analysis with default selections
description: This verifies that the MPPT analysis page loads with usable default content when a user opens it directly.

steps.description: Navigate to /MPPT_Analysis
Verify MPPT analysis controls are displayed
Verify initial MPPT diagnostics are displayed

title: Handle MPPT analysis when no inverter is selected
description: This verifies that the MPPT page presents a clear empty or prompt state before an inverter is chosen.

steps.description: Navigate to /MPPT_Analysis
Verify an inverter selection prompt or empty state is displayed
Verify MPPT diagnostics are not shown until an inverter is selected
